idea-plugin.name: Offensive360 SAST for Android Studio
idea-plugin.description:
Offensive360 SAST for Android Studio — scan your Android and mobile application code for vulnerabilities directly from the IDE.
Features: - Direct source code analysis with token-based authentication - Git repository scanning support - Tabbed results panel with severity-coded findings - Double-click navigation to vulnerable source lines - Built-in fix guidance from the vulnerability knowledge base - Dependency, malware, and license scanning - Large codebase support (1 GB+)

action.description: Scan the current project for vulnerabilities with Offensive 360 SAST
Scan a Git repository for vulnerabilities

idea-plugin.change-notes:
1.1.0

  • Branded as Offensive360 SAST for Android Studio
  • Added tabbed results tool window with severity-coded tables
  • Added vulnerability knowledge base with offline fix guidance
  • Added Git repository scanning
  • Typed scan result models (language, dependency, malware, license)
  • Large codebase support via temp-file-based zip
  • Background task scanning with cancellation support
  • Improved authentication error messages
  • Paginated result retrieval

1.0.0

  • Initial release
  • Token-based authentication with O360 server
  • Project and Git repository scanning
  • Real-time vulnerability annotations
